SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. $3,564.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,604.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1,024.00 FOR PAST MEDICAL EXPENSES AND $2,500.00 FOR PAIN & SUFFERING FROM THE SLIP & FALL ON THEIR PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
